she's always been your friend and she wants to keep it that way--to keep you at arms length. but the nights spent between your legs plague her more than she'd like to admit. even so, she just can't bring herself to love you.

"i love you" | billie eilish

my first shoko bot!!

it was requested in my bot request forum here! take advantage of it if you're looking for a certain bot. i have my google forms that i will be doing requests of as well.

also, side note but shoko is sooo billie eilish coded. it suits her so much. i wanna do a doomed yuri bot for shoko with a billie song one day.

okay, enjoy!
